title: Water drop tv screen
abstract: A display where water is applied onto the screen of a visual display monitor and graphics are presented on the display that coincides with the applied water is described. The timing of the water being applied to the screen and the playing of the graphics may be orchestrated such that the applied water seems to create the presented graphics. A controller may be used to control the water and the display.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1 . A display, comprising: a water delivery device that releases water; and a monitor; wherein the water intersects the monitor and the monitor displays graphics that coincide with the water. 2. The display of claim 1 , wherein the timing of the graphics coincides with the timing of the water as it intersects the monitor. 3. The display of claim 1 , further comprising an open water tank configured on top of the monitor that collects the water. 4. The display of claim 3, wherein the monitor is located at a depth below the surface of the water within the water tank. 5. The display of claim 2, wherein the timing of the graphics and the timing of the water is controlled by a controller. 6. The display of claim 3, wherein the controller controls the release of the water and waits a predetermined amount of time before controlling the graphics.
